title: Shoe Rack, 2-Column 9-Tier Shoe Storage Organizer, Metal Tall Shoe Rack Holds 24-30 Pairs of Shoes, Multi-Functional Vertical Shoe Stand, Ideal for Entryway, Closet, Hallway, Cloakroom White
features: LARGE STORAGE AND LOAD CAPACITY: The Lxvckly shoe rack organizer is the size for small spaces that can hold 24-30 pairs of shoes. The maximum weight capacity is 100 pounds, suitable for use in bedrooms, hallways, entryways, dorms, car entrances and more

MULTIFUNTIONAL SHOE RACK ORGANIZER: With its expandable design, this shoe rack is very practical. Buy two or more sets of shoe racks, assemble it into a larger shoe rack to store your family shoes. The shoe rack has hooks for hanging clothes, hats, bags, keys and more to keep your space organized

STABLE CONSTRUCTION: The tall shoe rack is made of reinforced PP connectors and upgraded strong corrosion resistant metal tubes, ensuring stability and durability for long time use, and prevents rust. The shoe organizer can also be assembled freely to change height. One layer can be removed to create a tall grid to accommodate tall boots

SPACE SAVING: The width of the narrow shoe rack is 80cm and the height of one tier is 20cm. Holds 24-30 pairs of adult shoes Metal vertical shoe cabinet maximizes space and provides a comfortable and organized home

EASY TO ASSEMBLE: Follow the assembly instruction, insert the iron pipe into the corresponding connection, tighten it to complete assembly. Please read the assembly instructions in the package and the assembly video on the product page carefully before assembling
description: Product Description Lxvckly Shoe Rack 9-Tier Metal Shoe Rack Organizer White This multifunctional metal shoe rack is specially designed for narrow spaces. It can be used to store sports shoes, high heels, casual shoes, slippers, boots, etc. It is wonderful whether it is placed in the living room, bedroom, corridor, or entryway. 9-Tier Metal Shoe Rack Organizer Lxvckly Shoe Rack 9-Tier Metal Shoe Organizer White Versatile modular metal storage shelf organizer The shoe rack is suitable for shoe storage in different spaces, whether it is the living room, bedroom, entryway, study, or dormitory apartment, it can be wonderful matched. It adopts a modular structure, is easy to disassemble, and has a maximum load-bearing capacity of 100lbs, which make it can be used to store clothes, books, toys, plants, etc. Narrow Space Shoe Rack Free Standing Storage Unit Multipurpose Storage Rack Portable Shoe Rack Organizer Lxvckly Shoe Rack 9-Tier Metal Shoe Organizer 28-34 Pairs Tall Shoe Storage Rack with Hook Shoe and Boots Organizer, Shoe Shelf Organizer for Entryway Closet Hallway The shoe rack is wonderful storage rack for your home. With the ability to adjust the height and easily stack the units, you can use it to organize shoes and accessories in narrow space, from the entryway to the bedroom, closet, hallway, dormitory or garage. The shoe rack organizer also comes with a multi-functional hook that can be used to hang keys, umbrellas, bags, and more. The shoe rack can be expanded and assembled according to your own needs. You can buy one set to assemble into a small shoe rack, or you can buy multiple sets to assemble into a larger one. The storage rack is suitable for storing shoes, bags, books, toys, etc. in the living room. The shoe organizer can be placed at the entryway to store shoes, bags, umbrellas, keys, etc. The storage shelf can be placed in the closet as a divider, making vertical use of closet space more efficient. Included High Quality Hook The shoe rack contains a row of hooks, which can be used to hang keys, bags, umbrellas, which is convenient and practical. Excellent Frame Structure The shoe rack is made of reinforced plastic connectors and high-quality iron pipes. The upgraded plastic parts design makes the shoe rack have good stability and durability after assembly. Multifunctional Storage Rack The multi-tiered design allows the storage shelves to be used to store shoes, boots, clothing, storage boxes, and other items. 9-Tier Metal Shoe Rack Organizer Shoe Storage Shelf The metal shoe rack offers exceptional organisation capabilities, accommodating 24-30 pairs of shoes in a space-efficient vertical design. The thoughtfully engineered structure features multiple shelves of varying heights, making it suitable for different types of footwear from trainers to boots. The white metal frame not only provides stability but also complements any interior décor scheme. With convenient hooks on both sides, you can hang additional accessories like umbrellas or bags. Perfect for entryways, closets, hallways, or cloakrooms, this multi-functional storage unit helps maintain order while maximising your available space. The durable construction ensures long-lasting performance, while the open design allows for proper air circulation around your footwear. Assembly is straightforward, and the modular design offers flexibility in arrangement to suit your specific needs.
